60: #[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize, Clone)]
61: pub struct ServerConfig {

63:     #[serde(default)]

75: }
76: 
77: pub fn load_config_from_path(path: &Path, _log_level: &str) -> Result<(ServerConfig, String), String> {
78:     // Phase 1: Load Main Config using ox_fileproc (handles standard includes/substitutions/merges)
79:     let processed_value = ox_fileproc::process_file(path, 10).map_err(|e| format!("ox_fileproc failed to process config {:?}: {}", path, e))?;
80:     
81:     // ox_fileproc returns a merged Value. We just deserialize.
82:     // Note: The 'merge' and 'merge_recursive' keys are removed by ox_fileproc upon processing, 
83:     // so ServerConfig.merge/merge_recursive will be None (default), which is correct.
84:     
85:     let config: ServerConfig = serde_json::from_value(processed_value).map_err(|e| format!("Failed to deserialize ServerConfig from processed JSON: {}", e))?;
86:     
87:     // Re-serialize strictly for the "json" return required by main
88:     let config_json = serde_json::to_string(&config).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;
89:     
90:     Ok((config, config_json))
91: }
